name: Enrica Floor Lamp - FLL4008 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Enrica floor lamp, standing at an elegant 66 inches. Crafted with a brass finish base, its design offers both style and function. The warm brass hue enhances any decor, bringing a touch of sophistication to your home. Topped with a white linen shade, it casts a soft, welcoming glow, perfect for reading or unwinding. The blend of iron and glass materials ensures sturdy craftsmanship and timeless appeal. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or office, the Enrica floor lamp becomes a statement piece, adding height and light to your favorite spaces. Experience style with effortless elegance.
